👤
About

I am a Computer Technology graduate from Cebu Technological University — San Francisco Campus, with hands-on experience in web development, server administration, embedded systems, and IT support.

Graduated Cum Laude, Batch 2026 — a result of four years of hard work, dedication, and a deep passion for technology.

I built real projects throughout my studies: from configuring Linux servers with Drupal CMS and MariaDB, to creating IoT security systems with Arduino and RFID, to leading a capstone research study that improved library catalog accessibility. I completed over a year of OJT at Sacred Heart School — Ateneo de Cebu SHS where I handled networking, PC repair, student technical support, 4K camera livestreaming for school events, and built a live library attendance system. The school's Christ-centered environment and the value of Magis deeply shaped how I approach work and life.

🏫
On-the-Job Training
Sacred Heart School — Ateneo de Cebu
Senior High School Department · IT Support, Library Systems & Event Production
📅 August 4, 2025 — Present  |  1+ Year
Networking PC Repair Laptop Troubleshooting Arduino Support Library Web System Student Assistance XAMPP VS Code Apache MySQL 4K Camera Event Livestream TV Display Setup Seminar Support
At Sacred Heart School — Ateneo de Cebu SHS, I handled network setup and troubleshooting, repaired laptops and desktop PCs, and supported students with Arduino and technical problems. I built the school's Library Attendance Monitoring System running live on campus. I also operated a 4K camera for school event livestreams — covering sports events, cultural shows, seminars with guest speakers, and orientation programs — handling camera positioning, live feed, and broadcast quality throughout.

Projects
SHS Library Attendance Monitoring System — Sacred Heart School Ateneo de Cebu
OJT · Web App
XAMPPApacheMySQLphpMyAdminVS CodePHPHTML/CSS

Built during OJT at Sacred Heart School — Ateneo de Cebu SHS. Students and faculty log in by name, select their visit purpose, and the system tracks all entries. Running live with over 572 visits, 698 students, and 314 staff.

OPAC Enhancement via Web-Based Survey Feedback
Research · Web
Drupal 10MySQLHTML/CSSResearch

Capstone thesis project led for the CTU San Francisco Learning Centre. Built a web-based survey using Drupal 10 Webforms to collect structured feedback from library users to improve OPAC digital accessibility.

📚
Enhancing Online Public Access Catalog Through Web-Based Survey Feedback and Analysis
Final Manuscript · BIT Computer Technology · CTU · May 2025
Final Hardbound Manuscript
Thesis Defense with Panel
Library System Presentation
RFID & ESP8266 Smart Access Control System
IoT · Hardware
ArduinoESP8266RFID RC522C++

Built a wireless access control prototype using RFID card scanning and ESP8266 Wi-Fi to send access logs to a monitoring interface in real time.

Ubuntu Linux Server & Drupal CMS Deployment
Linux · Server
UbuntuDrupal 10MariaDBApache

Full Linux server setup from bare OS install — Apache, MariaDB, Drupal CMS, and user permissions. Hardware: Dell OptiPlex 3020 Micro, deployed for the CTU library.
